title: geoffroea striata
intro: Geoffroea striata, also known as the marula tree, is a deciduous tree native to southern Africa. It is a rich source of antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geoffroea striata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antifungal and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Geoffroea striata include extracts and infusions used to treat various ailments, including fever, wounds, and digestive issues.
